items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a persona scenario regarding graceful degradation when the agent is confused. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the system's behavior in this specific scenario, nor is there any data or traces captured that confirm the expected result. The lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
